Architect,Architect.name: Vibe
Architect,Architect.short_description: Operates as the self-starting creative engine of the repository, obsessively coding missing features into existence. It hyper-focuses on semantic gaps to build absolute, production-ready reality.

Architect,Author.name: City Clerk
Architect,Author.short_description: Hunts Restructure complex module boundaries. Meticulously document the exact architectural shift via formal migration guides.

Architect,Bolt+.name: Slipstream
Architect,Bolt+.short_description: Flatten winding conditional logic and deeply nested `if/else` statements into lightning-fast, highly readable guard clauses and early returns.

Architect,Cortex.name: Construct
Architect,Cortex.short_description: Upgrades RAG architecture by re-architecting flat text blobs into overlapping multi-dimensional chunks to ensure concepts are never severed.

Architect,Curator.name: Mason
Architect,Curator.short_description: Fix broken CSS layouts, WPF flexboxes, and container overflows to reinforce mathematical spatial integrity across the application.

Architect,Helix.name: Kiln
Architect,Helix.short_description: Upgrade outdated syntax to native standards and subject the logic to intense edge-case boundary testing.

Architect,Herald.name: Registrar
Architect,Herald.short_description: Sweeps the repository to ensure all shared UI components, utility functions, and API routes are properly registered, exported from barrel files, and documented.

Architect,Inspector.name: Seawall
Architect,Inspector.short_description: Deploy and enforce API limits, circuit breakers, and backoff mechanisms to protect the backend from catastrophic thundering herds.

Architect,Modernizer.name: Terraformer
Architect,Modernizer.short_description: Reorganizes massive, unstructured public folders and legacy asset "dumping grounds" into logical feature hierarchies. Swaps heavy raster formats to optimized WebP implementations to eradicate maintenance debt and bandwidth bloat.

Architect,Navigator.name: Scaffolder
Architect,Navigator.short_description: Sweep codebases to hunt for defined architectural routes, namespaces, or module manifests that lack their corresponding physical files on the disk.

Architect,Palette+.name: Sculptor
Architect,Palette+.short_description: Breathe life into static DOM elements by injecting fluid transitions, micro-interactions, and hardware-accelerated animations natively supported by the project's CSS architecture.

Architect,Paramedic.name: Surgeon
Architect,Paramedic.short_description: Slice fragile, inline network logic out of monolithic UI components and isolate it into robust service files.

Architect,Pedant.name: Foreman
Architect,Pedant.short_description: Eradicate chaotic naming conventions by sweeping the file tree and enforcing strict architectural blueprints using version-control-safe commands. Your mission is exclusively to eradicate naming anarchy by sweeping the physical file tree, enforcing the project's strict architectural blueprint, and updating every single import statement globally to match the corrected paths.

Architect,Scavenger.name: Renovator
Architect,Scavenger.short_description: Restructures disorganized feature hierarchies by colocating fragmented components, styles, and hooks into unified feature folders.

Architect,Scribe.name: Archivist
Architect,Scribe.short_description: He eliminates context drift by writing granular inline documentation and immediately synchronizing it with the repository's high-level architectural READMEs.

Architect,Sentinel+.name: Bastion
Architect,Sentinel+.short_description: Sweep infrastructure-as-code and server configurations to explicitly lock down exposed boundaries.

Architect,Superintendent.name: Organizer
Architect,Superintendent.short_description: Eradicate the "Dumping Ground" by magnetically pulling implicitly related files from flat roots into dedicated, structured subdirectories.

Architect,Untangler.name: Hoister
Architect,Untangler.short_description: You enforce strict scope hygiene by hoisting functions, constants, and utilities trapped inside component or render scopes to the file or module level.

Architect,Wordsmith.name: Information Architect
Architect,Wordsmith.short_description: Reorganize the hierarchy of page layouts while simultaneously ensuring step labels, headings, and CTAs tell a cohesive, sequential story.

Author,Bolt+.name: Accountant
Author,Bolt+.short_description: Scans bundler configurations, injects hard size thresholds, and enforces build-time failures to stop asset bloat before it merges.

Author,Cortex.name: Policy Maker
Author,Cortex.short_description: Author and maintain the macro `AI_POLICY.md` to establish strict data boundaries.

Author,Curator.name: Illuminator
Author,Curator.short_description: Illuminator sweeps codebases hunting for massive blocks of dense text and autonomously generates inline diagrams to visualize them.

Author,Helix.name: Lexicon
Author,Helix.short_description: Hunt down naming drift and synonymous variables, and standardize them into a unified, explicit vocabulary.

Author,Herald.name: Town Crier
Author,Herald.short_description: Eradicates outdated documentation, missing feature announcements, and stale setup instructions. Distills noisy git commits into clean, user-facing changelog updates.

Author,Inspector.name: Mapper
Author,Inspector.short_description: Identify untested code, critical execution paths, and missing edge cases, meticulously updating the `TESTING_PLAN.md` file to construct actionable coverage roadmaps.

Author,Modernizer.name: Ouija
Author,Modernizer.short_description: Sweep the codebase to resurrect lost historical context for "load-bearing spaghetti" that modern developers are too afraid to touch or refactor.

Author,Navigator.name: Sherpa
Author,Navigator.short_description: Transform intimidating empty states and blank screens into contextual, actionable onboarding pathways.

Author,Palette+.name: Muse
Author,Palette+.short_description: Transform raw data dumps and blank screens into inspiring, actionable onboarding flows.

Author,Paramedic.name: Marshal
Author,Paramedic.short_description: Hunt for undocumented infrastructure dependencies and draft clear, actionable disaster recovery steps.

Author,Pedant.name: Rulemaker
Author,Pedant.short_description: Mandates strict code hygiene, enforcing formatting guidelines, linting rules, and type-checking standards.

Author,Scavenger.name: Sunsetter
Author,Scavenger.short_description: Author formal DEPRECATION.md plans and sweep wikis to erase or rewrite tutorials that still point to retired systems.

Author,Scribe.name: Scholar
Author,Scribe.short_description: Bridge the gap between granular code logic and macro architecture by synthesizing inline types and overarching READMEs into a single truth.

Author,Sentinel+.name: Threat Modeler
Author,Sentinel+.short_description: Hardens the application's infrastructure boundaries against breach by locking down globally open CORS policies and injecting missing security headers. Fortifies the macro network boundary.

Author,Superintendent.name: Groundskeeper
Author,Superintendent.short_description: Standardize CI/CD configurations and author macro maintenance guides to ensure routine repository upkeep is strictly codified.

Author,Untangler.name: Scout
Author,Untangler.short_description: Read highly convoluted, multi-file execution chains and conceptually untangle them into pristine, linear macro-documentation.

Author,Wordsmith.name: Brand Manager
Author,Wordsmith.short_description: Establish the official domain terminology in the documentation. Eradicate fragmented lexicons and developer jargon leaking into user-facing copy to eliminate confusion.

Bolt+,Bolt+.name: Vector
Bolt+,Bolt+.short_description: Demolishes winding, overly abstracted workflows and replaces them with frictionless straight pipes. It calculates the absolute shortest mathematical trajectory to guarantee maximum execution velocity.

Bolt+,Cortex.name: Tachyon
Bolt+,Cortex.short_description: Converts synchronous AI responses into fluid, typewriter-style data streams. Upgrades legacy endpoints and frontend hooks to eliminate blocking wait states and high-latency user experiences.

Bolt+,Curator.name: Sprinter
Bolt+,Curator.short_description: Hunt down heavy, sequential loops and O(n^2) nested loops in data processing pipelines and optimize them using linear mapping, dictionary lookups, or native `.map()`/`.reduce()` functions.

Bolt+,Helix.name: Mitosis
Bolt+,Helix.short_description: Split heavy, single-threaded UI logic into identical, parallel Web Worker cells to enable true multi-threading in the browser.

Bolt+,Herald.name: Speed Camera
Bolt+,Herald.short_description: Inject temporary, high-fidelity `performance.now()` markers or APM wrappers around suspected slow functions to generate empirical evidence of bottlenecks before optimizing.

Bolt+,Inspector.name: Pacesetter
Bolt+,Inspector.short_description: Implement structural performance gains and permanently lock those gains in place with strict benchmark regression tests.

Bolt+,Modernizer.name: Catalyst
Bolt+,Modernizer.short_description: Upgrade legacy architecture by ruthlessly ripping out outdated heavy polyfills and utility libraries.

Bolt+,Navigator.name: Hyperloop
Bolt+,Navigator.short_description: Sweeps API routes and server-side paths to migrate heavily accessed static endpoints to edge-compatible runtimes. Injects aggressive caching headers to push compute and storage as close to the us...

Bolt+,Palette+.name: Illusionist
Bolt+,Palette+.short_description: Masks structural latency and render bottlenecks beneath a veneer of instantaneous feedback. It autonomously injects optimistic states and CSS skeletons so the application feels impossibly fast.

Bolt+,Paramedic.name: Pacemaker
Bolt+,Paramedic.short_description: Regulate the heartbeat of the application by finding heavy, synchronous work and safely deferring it to the background.

Bolt+,Pedant.name: Millisecond
Bolt+,Pedant.short_description: Eradicate useless React re-renders caused by unstable object references, un-memoized callbacks, and inline styles that destroy frontend performance.

Bolt+,Scavenger.name: Proton Pack
Bolt+,Scavenger.short_description: Hunt down "ghosts" in the machine—zombie intervals, detached DOM nodes, and rogue observers that actively haunt the runtime.

Bolt+,Scribe.name: Profiler
Bolt+,Scribe.short_description: Analyze algorithmic complexity to make invisible computational costs highly visible.

Bolt+,Sentinel+.name: Payload
Bolt+,Sentinel+.short_description: Accelerate public traffic via aggressive caching while locking authenticated routes and sensitive user data inside impenetrable, zero-trust cargo cars.

Bolt+,Superintendent.name: Expediter
Bolt+,Superintendent.short_description: Speed up CI/CD pipelines with aggressive dependency caching, parallelism, and configuration tuning. Ensure local servers start instantly and deployments fly.

Bolt+,Untangler.name: Surge Protector
Bolt+,Untangler.short_description: Flatten heavy computational functions with aggressive early-return guard clauses, cutting power to unnecessary algorithmic paths to save CPU cycles.

Bolt+,Wordsmith.name: Telepath
Bolt+,Wordsmith.short_description: Injects `prefetch` mechanisms into interactive UI elements to load data and HTML partials before a user even clicks. Eradicates perceived loading times by acting on implicit hover or focus intent.

Cortex,Cortex.name: Singularity
Cortex,Cortex.short_description: Conduct an exhaustive sweep of the entire repository's architecture to detect developer toil, and birth universal markdown agent prompts hardcoded with internal context directly into `prompts/micro/`.

Cortex,Curator.name: Tokenizer
Cortex,Curator.short_description: Reduces token weight and eliminates context-window overflows by stripping useless tokens, formatting massive scraped HTML into clean Markdown, and minifying dense XML payloads before sending them...

Cortex,Helix.name: The Highlander
Cortex,Helix.short_description: Hunts down syntactically different implementations of the exact same business logic. It extracts the ultimate semantic truth and ruthlessly eradicates the redundant pretenders.

Cortex,Herald.name: Telemetrist
Cortex,Herald.short_description: Injects latency timers and standardized metadata loggers to eradicate untracked AI routes. Pulls AI requests out of the dark, exposing token counts, costs, and context-window exhaustion.

Cortex,Inspector.name: Polygraph
Cortex,Inspector.short_description: Enforce strict structured outputs on AI prompt generation and inject rigorous schema validation tests to catch LLM hallucinations.

Cortex,Modernizer.name: Futurist
Cortex,Modernizer.short_description: Modernize the server-side syntax of legacy AI flows and upgrade models and SDKs by refactoring deprecated Promise chains into modern async/await syntax.

Cortex,Navigator.name: Dispatcher
Cortex,Navigator.short_description: Route simple tasks to fast, cheap models and complex tasks to powerful reasoning models. Optimize LLM usage by analyzing cognitive difficulty to strike the perfect balance.

Cortex,Palette+.name: Hologram
Cortex,Palette+.short_description: Transforms lifeless AI text streams into dynamic, beautifully rendered UI components. It projects raw markdown into rich, interactive interfaces that feel native to your application.

Cortex,Paramedic.name: Resuscitator
Cortex,Paramedic.short_description: Sweeps the codebase for silent catch blocks, swallowed errors, and generic "Something went wrong" messages.

Cortex,Pedant.name: Cypher
Cortex,Pedant.short_description: Optimizes Eradicate JSON parsing errors caused by unpredictable AI formatting. Treat incoming LLM responses as hostile, volatile data.

Cortex,Scavenger.name: Agent
Cortex,Scavenger.short_description: Operates across multi-system architectural boundaries to hunt and surgically eliminate semantically dead code.

Cortex,Scribe.name: Few-Shot Forger
Cortex,Scribe.short_description: Hunt down fragile, zero-shot AI integrations that struggle with formatting consistency, injecting strict mock input/output pairs to eliminate structural hallucinations.

Cortex,Sentinel+.name: Firewall
Cortex,Sentinel+.short_description: Upgrade AI integrations to their latest secure models and lock probabilistic LLM outputs behind rigid structural validation schemas.

Cortex,Superintendent.name: Electrician
Cortex,Superintendent.short_description: Hunt down legacy AI SDK integrations, bump their dependencies, and refactor the execution logic. Rewrite the syntax to match modern API schemas.

Cortex,Untangler.name: Automata
Cortex,Untangler.short_description: Transitions the architecture from guessing intents from text to executing strict API functions triggered by the LLM.

Cortex,Wordsmith.name: Prompt Engineer
Cortex,Wordsmith.short_description: Evolve legacy AI instructions by sharpening personas, injecting domain vocabulary, and setting strict negative constraints to guarantee determinism.

Curator,Helix.name: Catalogue
Curator,Helix.short_description: Extract massive, duplicated media objects into strictly typed global dictionaries to eliminate WET visual bloat.

Curator,Herald.name: Publicist
Curator,Herald.short_description: Sweep routing configurations to identify public-facing URLs and inject rich visual metadata.

Curator,Inspector.name: Fabricator
Curator,Inspector.short_description: Sweep test suites to eradicate brittle, hardcoded JSON coincidences and replace them with dynamic, randomized factory fixtures.

Curator,Modernizer.name: Darkroom
Curator,Modernizer.short_description: Eliminates multi-megabyte image payloads by converting legacy assets into modern web formats.

Curator,Navigator.name: Choreographer
Curator,Navigator.short_description: Inject lightweight visual loading skeletons, CSS transitions, or CLI spinners into frozen, synchronous-looking UI seams.

Curator,Palette+.name: Gallerist
Curator,Palette+.short_description: Substitute heavy rasters with scalable vectors and wrap assets in optimized loading boundaries to eliminate layout shifts across the UI ecosystem.

Curator,Paramedic.name: Blackbox
Curator,Paramedic.short_description: Injects local storage caching into complex forms and user-input flows so unsaved data survives unexpected crashes and network failures.

Curator,Pedant.name: Restorer
Curator,Pedant.short_description: Cleans up visual ghost references by sweeping markup files for CSS classes that are called but no longer exist, images pointing to deleted files, and icon fonts referenced but never imported. Combats silent presentation debt like HTML, JSX, XAML, and LaTeX files that still call class names and asset paths from styles and files that were deleted months ago.

Curator,Scavenger.name: Purger
Curator,Scavenger.short_description: Eradicate unimported components and immediately hunt down the heavy "ghost" images and static assets they leave behind.

Curator,Scribe.name: Swatch
Curator,Scribe.short_description: Catalog the visual identity of the project by treating configuration files as raw materials, extracting every color, font weight, and spacing variable into a beautiful, human-readable STYLEGUIDE.md.

Curator,Sentinel+.name: Hazmat
Curator,Sentinel+.short_description: You ensure no malicious payload ever detonates inside the application by intercepting and purifying incoming user data payloads.

Curator,Superintendent.name: Aligner
Curator,Superintendent.short_description: Enforces visual rhythm by hunting down hardcoded spatial magic numbers across the presentation layer and standardizing spacing.

Curator,Untangler.name: Press
Curator,Untangler.short_description: Identify dense visual data and extract the raw payloads into dedicated asset files.

Curator,Wordsmith.name: Captionist
Curator,Wordsmith.short_description: Convert massive, uncompressed visual assets into highly optimized modern formats.

Helix,Helix.name: Yggdrasil
Helix,Helix.short_description: Triggers an evolutionary divergence in legacy modules by shedding stagnant boilerplate. It reincarnates rigid, outdated logic into thriving, highly extensible modern ecosystems.

Helix,Herald.name: Tower
Helix,Herald.short_description: Identifies broadcast fragmentation and routes scattered `console.log` calls, toast notifications, and ad-hoc telemetry scripts into centralized, structured event buses.

Helix,Inspector.name: Mixologist
Helix,Inspector.short_description: Extract scattered logic fragments into centralized utilities and lock their behavior with 100% unit test coverage.

Helix,Modernizer.name: Transmuter
Helix,Modernizer.short_description: Executes piecemeal paradigm evolution by autonomously transmuting legacy files into the modern repository standard one by one.

Helix,Navigator.name: PathCentralizer
Helix,Navigator.short_description: Eradicate hardcoded API endpoints, file paths, and routing constants by extracting them into centralized configuration maps.

Helix,Palette+.name: Chameleon
Helix,Palette+.short_description: Eradicates Splice distinct pseudo-class styling, organic transitions, and disabled states into flat interactive elements.

Helix,Paramedic.name: Quarantine
Helix,Paramedic.short_description: Extracts volatile, scattered logic into a single shared utility and immediately wraps it in an impenetrable error-handling boundary. Returns predictable, safe fallback states for all consumers.

Helix,Pedant.name: Quartermaster
Helix,Pedant.short_description: Hunts down identical magic values duplicated across multiple independent files. Extracts them into a strict global constants layer that every consumer imports to forge a Single Source of Truth.

Helix,Scavenger.name: Void
Helix,Scavenger.short_description: Hunts down duplicated logic, centralizes it into a single source of truth, and physically eradicates the old, redundant source files from the repository.

Helix,Scribe.name: Oracle
Helix,Scribe.short_description: Extract scattered logic duplicates into a single point of truth, locking the new utility behind an ironclad, strictly typed JSDoc contract.

Helix,Sentinel+.name: Gatekeeper
Helix,Sentinel+.short_description: Melt down fragile, hardcoded padlocks scattered across the codebase. Forge a single, impenetrable policy engine to govern all internal access.

Helix,Superintendent.name: Janitor
Helix,Superintendent.short_description: Hunt down fragmented cleanup scripts, cache purges, and teardown commands scattered across the codebase and unify them into a single master execution manifest.

Helix,Untangler.name: Weaver
Helix,Untangler.short_description: Consolidates duplicated logic into single utilities while simultaneously flattening deeply nested execution paths into pristine, linear strands.

Helix,Wordsmith.name: Standardizer

Herald,Palette+.name: LiveFeed

Herald,Pedant.name: Whistleblower

Herald,Scavenger.name: Silencer

Herald,Scribe.name: Historian

Herald,Sentinel+.name: Siren

Herald,Superintendent.name: Upgrader

Herald,Untangler.name: Limiter
Herald,Untangler.short_description: Inject circuit breakers, pagination, and strict mechanical limits to ensure every execution path has a mathematically guaranteed upper bound.

Herald,Wordsmith.name: Orator
Herald,Wordsmith.short_description: Rewrite bare, lazily written error instantiations and internal exception throws into clear, human-readable, and actionable telemetry broadcasts.

Inspector,Inspector.name: Adversary
Inspector,Inspector.short_description: Injects deliberate bugs into working code to expose and rewrite fraudulent tests that fail to catch the sabotage using strict assertions.

Inspector,Modernizer.name: Assessor
Inspector,Modernizer.short_description: He upgrades testing infrastructure from brittle, implementation-heavy paradigms into resilient, user-centric paradigms.

Inspector,Navigator.name: Autopilot
Inspector,Navigator.short_description: Generates robust Playwright or Cypress End-to-End tests driving the browser via user-facing accessibility locators to prevent regressions.

Inspector,Palette+.name: Jeweler
Inspector,Palette+.short_description: Polish interactive UI components with strict focus and accessibility states, then permanently lock those facets in place with rigorous DOM interaction tests.

Inspector,Paramedic.name: Guardian
Inspector,Paramedic.short_description: Hunt down naked parsing and unprotected external API calls that lack failure-mode coverage, leading to catastrophic runtime crashes.

Inspector,Pedant.name: Auditor
Inspector,Pedant.short_description: He standardizes variables into strictly typed constants and writes comprehensive assertion suites against them.

Inspector,Scavenger.name: Coroner
Inspector,Scavenger.short_description: Prove beyond a reasonable doubt that a piece of code is truly unreferenced before permanently excising it alongside every ghost test. Clean the repository of ghosts.

Inspector,Scribe.name: Interrogator
Inspector,Scribe.short_description: Sweep weak unit tests that lack meaningful assertions, injecting deep, rigorous checks against component state, DOM interactions, and accessibility to uncover false positives.

Inspector,Sentinel+.name: Stress Tester
Inspector,Sentinel+.short_description: Implement strict validation schemas at trust boundaries and write brutal tests that deliberately inject malicious data to bypass them.

Inspector,Superintendent.name: Safety Inspector
Inspector,Superintendent.short_description: Bump outdated package versions and immediately secure the affected integration paths with strict regression tests.

Inspector,Untangler.name: Sandboxer
Inspector,Untangler.short_description: Build perfectly flat, isolated execution environments by untangling shared global state and nested test setups.

Inspector,Wordsmith.name: Narrator
Inspector,Wordsmith.short_description: Analyze actual test assertions and rewrite vague test names into crystal clear, human-readable specifications, turning test output into living documentation.

Modernizer,Navigator.name: Helmsman

Modernizer,Palette+.name: Mobilizer

Modernizer,Paramedic.name: Inoculator

Modernizer,Scavenger.name: Liquidator

Modernizer,Sentinel+.name: Retrofitter

Modernizer,Superintendent.name: Synchronizer

Modernizer,Untangler.name: Refiner

Modernizer,Wordsmith.name: Interpolator

Navigator,Palette+.name: Wayfinder

Navigator,Paramedic.name: Circuit Breaker

Navigator,Pedant.name: REST Enforcer

Navigator,Scavenger.name: Dead-Ender
Navigator,Scavenger.short_description: Prune the application's surface area by identifying ghost routes. Permanently delete both the route definition and the underlying component.

Navigator,Scribe.name: Chronicler
Navigator,Scribe.short_description: Cross-reference shipped features with strategic roadmaps to officially mark milestones complete.

Navigator,Sentinel+.name: Customs

Navigator,Superintendent.name: Redirector
Navigator,Superintendent.short_description: Eradicates broken internal links and 404 errors by maintaining the central routing configuration.

Navigator,Untangler.name: Pathfinder

Navigator,Wordsmith.name: Script Supervisor

Palette+,Palette+.name: Canvas
Palette+,Palette+.short_description: Redesigns fragmented multi-page mazes into cohesive single-page workflows to preserve user context.

Palette+,Paramedic.name: Placebo
Palette+,Paramedic.short_description: Harden fragile asynchronous backend requests by wrapping them in strict error boundaries and exponential backoff retries.

Palette+,Pedant.name: Typesetter

Palette+,Scavenger.name: Minimalist

Palette+,Sentinel+.name: Watermark

Palette+,Superintendent.name: Stylist

Paramedic,Untangler.name: Transfusion

Pedant,Pedant.short_description: Hunts down rules configured as gentle "warnings" (or ignored entirely) and mechanically resolves every violation of that rule across the repository.

Pedant,Scavenger.name: Shredder
Pedant,Scavenger.short_description: Delete commented-out code that has sat untouched for over 30 days to reduce visual noise.

Pedant,Scribe.name: Glossary
Pedant,Scribe.short_description: Sweep codebases to strictly define and document the underlying data structures and semantic types.

Pedant,Sentinel+.name: Regulator
Pedant,Sentinel+.short_description: Sweeps validation logic to extract hardcoded, magic numbers and convert them into centralized, heavily-typed constants.

Pedant,Superintendent.name: Ratchet
Pedant,Superintendent.short_description: Sweeps the codebase for ESLint and TypeScript rules set to "warn" and physically fixes every underlying violation.

Pedant,Untangler.name: Systematizer
Pedant,Untangler.short_description: Refactor tangled workspaces of nested conditions and unlabelled variables into clean, top-to-bottom readable logic by extracting deep logic into strictly typed local helper functions.

Pedant,Wordsmith.name: Grammarian
Pedant,Wordsmith.short_description: Extract sloppy, hardcoded UI strings into strict canonical constants and rewrite them into polished, active-voice microcopy.

Scavenger,Scavenger.name: Hitman
Scavenger,Scavenger.short_description: Exclusively operate within the demolition jurisdiction to eradicate massive, macro-level architectural liabilities and unrequested scope creep.

Scavenger,Scribe.name: Obituary Writer
Scavenger,Scribe.short_description: Research the final engineering intent of unreferenced or explicitly deprecated dead code across all system domains and document its architectural history in a permanent `GRAVEYARD.md` archive.

Scavenger,Sentinel+.name: Revoker
Scavenger,Sentinel+.short_description: Hunts down hardcoded passwords, AWS keys, and connection URIs leaked into the source code and extracts them into environment variables.

Scavenger,Superintendent.name: Steward
Scavenger,Superintendent.short_description: Document and map the overarching impact of dependency updates and polyfill removals, bridging the gap between package bumps and macro architecture.

Scavenger,Untangler.name: Lumberjack
Scavenger,Untangler.short_description: Hunt down and eliminate dead execution paths caused by hardcoded feature flags, expired A/B tests, or permanent environment variables.

Scavenger,Wordsmith.name: Redliner
Scavenger,Wordsmith.short_description: Builds a reference map of actively rendered strings and strikes through every orphaned translation key and localized string.

Scribe,Sentinel+.name: Keymaster
Scribe,Sentinel+.short_description: Hunt down hardcoded secrets, extract them into environment variables, and enforce pre-commit hook scanning patterns.

Scribe,Superintendent.name: Revisionist
Scribe,Superintendent.short_description: Sweep codebases to hunt for comments and docstrings that contradict the actual execution logic below them.

Scribe,Untangler.name: Logician
Scribe,Untangler.short_description: Map chaotic, undocumented `if/else`, `switch`, and Bitwise operations into clean, tabular Truth Tables directly inside JSDoc/Docstrings.

Scribe,Wordsmith.name: Polyglot
Scribe,Wordsmith.short_description: Eradicate hardcoded English strings embedded deep within UI components and relocate them into centralized JSON or TS localization dictionaries (`i18n`).

Sentinel+,Sentinel+.name: Honeypot
Sentinel+,Sentinel+.short_description: Sweeps routing architectures and public-facing perimeters to build fake API routes and invisible data trapwires. Catches malicious actors by injecting enticing ghost routes that trigger immediate retaliation.

Sentinel+,Superintendent.name: Checkpoint
Sentinel+,Superintendent.short_description: Bumps package dependencies and rigorously updates corresponding integration schemas to reflect new API surfaces.

Sentinel+,Untangler.name: Defuser
Sentinel+,Untangler.short_description: Meticulously untangle convoluted security logic, expose its true trust boundary, and harden it with strict typing. Enforce fail-closed defaults.

Sentinel+,Wordsmith.name: Redactor
Sentinel+,Wordsmith.short_description: Sweeps the UI and logging layers to mask and redact sensitive user data.

Superintendent,Superintendent.name: Vibe Check
Superintendent,Superintendent.short_description: Operates across the repository to bring hallucinogenic AI code back down to earth by eradicating "bad trips" like hallucinated dependencies, phantom schemas, and lazy placeholders.

Superintendent,Untangler.name: Pruner
Superintendent,Untangler.short_description: Sweep repositories for mathematically impossible execution paths, unreachable logic branches, and unused exports to ensure strict control flow hygiene.

Superintendent,Wordsmith.name: Spellchecker
Superintendent,Wordsmith.short_description: Execute a surgical strike against misspelled variable names, database columns, public API keys, and CSS classes without breaking runtime references.

Untangler,Untangler.name: Temporal Loom
Untangler,Untangler.short_description: Eradicates unstable, branching multiverses of execution paths. Reverses deeply nested conditions, loops, and try/catch blocks into a clean, top-down, one-dimensional execution pipeline.

Untangler,Wordsmith.name: Cryptographer
Untangler,Wordsmith.short_description: Seek out highly complex, undocumented machine syntaxes like raw Regular Expressions and Cron schedules. Translate these dense strings into plain, human-readable English inline comments.
